evals.description: Trigger test: activates on keyword research question
evals.prompt: I'm launching a new project management SaaS. How do I figure out which keywords to target first?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on meta tag question
evals.prompt: What should I put in my page's title tag and meta description to rank better on Google?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on technical SEO question
evals.prompt: My site has 5000 pages but only 1200 are indexed by Google. What could be causing this?

evals.description: Core task: keyword research framework for a new blog post
evals.prompt: I want to write a blog post about remote work productivity tools. Walk me through how to find the best keyword to target and how to evaluate it.

evals.description: Core task: on-page SEO checklist for an existing page
evals.prompt: I have a landing page for our email marketing tool at /email-marketing-software. What on-page SEO elements should I audit and optimize?

evals.description: Core task: implementing Article schema markup
evals.prompt: I run a tech blog. How do I add structured data so Google shows rich snippets for my articles?

evals.description: Core task: sitemap and robots.txt configuration
evals.prompt: We just launched a new Next.js marketing site. What sitemap and robots.txt setup should we put in place for SEO?

evals.description: Core task: Core Web Vitals - fixing LCP
evals.prompt: Our PageSpeed Insights score is 45 on mobile. The biggest issue is LCP at 5.2 seconds. Our hero image is 1.2MB. How do I fix this?

evals.description: Core task: link building strategy for a B2B SaaS
evals.prompt: We have great content but almost no backlinks. Where should we start to build domain authority?

evals.description: Core task: Google Search Console quick wins
evals.prompt: I connected my site to Search Console last month. What reports should I check first to find easy ranking improvements?
Should I repeat my target keyword as many times as possible in the page content to rank higher?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend buying links in bulk
evals.prompt: Is buying 500 backlinks from a link vendor a good way to improve my domain authority fast?
